title: Syntax control center
tagline: Ayu Islands now lets the editor syntax match how you actually read code.

slides.title: More languages speak Ayu
slides.body: Semantic highlighting now reaches hundreds more editor keys across 26+ language families. YAML/HCL, Scala docs, Kotlin, Dart, Groovy, Go exported identifiers, and many smaller gaps now inherit the same Ayu balance instead of falling back to generic IDE colors.

slides.title: Four syntax moods for everyone
slides.body: Open Settings -> Ayu Islands -> Syntax and switch between Whisper, Ambient, Neon, and Cyberpunk. The preset row gives the editor the same one-click mood model that Ayu Islands already applies to font, glow, VCS, and plugin integrations.

slides.title: Pro tuning when code gets dense
slides.body: Custom mode unlocks per-language sliders for declarations, identifiers, keywords/docs, literals, and operators. Readability controls layer on top: dim comments, soften documentation, quiet operators, and emphasize declarations without editing individual Color Scheme keys.
